latin: Luffy pileum stramineum in capite posuit et magna voce dixit: 'ego rex piratarum ero!' amici eius riserunt, sed sciebant eum non iocari.

questions.prompt: What does Luffy want to become?
What did Luffy put on his head?

translation: Luffy placed his straw hat on his head and said in a loud voice: 'I will be King of the Pirates!' His friends laughed, but they knew he was not joking.
